userLevel: 中文办公用户 / office user
scenario: Product pitch, launch narrative, investor update, or demo-day story.
narrativeSkeleton: Hook with the user pain and why now.
Show the product wedge in one simple workflow.
Prove that the solution is real, not just a claim.
Connect traction or roadmap to a bigger market shift.
qualityChecks: First three slides are understandable without narration.
The product proof is concrete and visible.
Visuals show workflow, state, or user outcome instead of abstract decoration.
Claims about traction or market timing are sourced or clearly labeled as assumptions.
Optional PPTX handoff keeps summary and appendix editable.

qualityProfile.label: 产品路演展示质量
acceptanceCriteria: first three slides are understandable without narration
product proof shows workflow, state, or user outcome
market and traction claims are sourced or labeled as assumptions
mobile Web Deck remains readable with no overlapping controls

notFor: routine internal status reports that need dense KPI tables
regulated fundraising material without source and compliance review

sampleProof.notes: Synthetic product pitch skeleton and visible starter proof for public demos and web handoff.
